zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay於1145年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可喬加時，他的父親Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay32歲，母親Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay15歲。他於大約1175年與Isabel de Heydon在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1208年在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國素瑞素瓦可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay于1145年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可喬加时，他的父亲Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay32岁，母亲Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay15岁。他于大约1175年与Isabel de Heydon在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1208年在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国素瑞素瓦可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay was born in 1145, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay, was 32 and his mother, Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, was 15. He married Isabel de Heydon about 1175, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1208, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Southwark, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay est né en 1145, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Heydon environ 1175, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1208, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Southwark, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay 1145 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay 32 und seine Mutter Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay 15. Er hat um 1175 in Norfolk, England Isabel de Heydon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1208 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Southwark, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay è nato il nel 1145 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Heydon circa 1175, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1208, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Southwark, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Warenne Lord of Wormegayが1145年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgayは32歳，母Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegayは15歳であった。約1175年にイギリスノーフォルクでIsabel de Heydonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1208年に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリススリーソウスワークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay(이)가 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1175년 영국 노르폴크에서 Isabel de Heydon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1208년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 소우스워크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay nasceu em 1145, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Heydon aproximadamente 1175, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1208, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay родился в 1145 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Heydon около 1175 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1208 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности соутварк, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay nació en 1145, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Warenne Lord of Wormgay, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Isabel de Heydon aproximadamente 1175, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1208, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra.
